en.titleEnableAutomaticTTS: Do you wish to enable automatic text to speech?
en.titleWrongAnswer: You were caught! But don't worry.
en.bodyPlayAgainWarning: You can play levels again if you want to earn 3 stars!
en.titleRateTheGame: Hey, don’t forget to rate the game!
en.ef66d937: Hey there! Why are you here?
en.43dbe9bd: Only the egg protection team should be here!
en.9f783238: Anyway, more hands to help protect the eggs! It’s been unusually calm these days…
en.e4d90f22: Hey there! Why are you here?
en.d95063a4: Only the egg protection team should be here!
en.b0d4d1c2: Anyway, more hands to help protect the eggs! It’s been unusually calm these days…
en.0668da3e: That’s not just any barrier, the pigs built it so we can only break it if we hit it with the right amount of birds! See the number on top?
en.761389dc: Just add the correct amount to the sling and hit it!
en.556f6300: I knew it! Those pigs never give up! Where’s the other when I need them? Hey come here and help me!
en.0764c55e: Now you know what to do, let’s get them out of here!
en.216ef4b9:
Here we learned that if we add 4 groups of 2 birds we have 8 birds! But did you know that there’s another way of doing the same thing?
Let’s discover!
en.a9b4d9e7:
It seems the number is not quite right! 
Remember: The groups have 2 birds each and you need to have 8 birds in total.
en.afeb7812: Click here to add groups of two!
en.92c0c3fa: We are running out of birds and these barriers keep coming! What do we do?
en.32322043: Don’t worry I have a secret weapon!
en.97cb9ea2:
Instead of adding the birds to the sling we will multiply them by shooting through the portal! It will give us the same result as adding them up! 

If we shoot a group of 2 birds by x2 portal we will come out with 4 birds! Because:

2 times 2 = 4 like 2+2 = 4 (visual representation of the groups is needed)
en.3dac115e: Let’s try it out? Shoot the birds through the portal and you will see them multiplicate!
en.456a45f8:
Instead of adding the birds to the sling we will multiply them by shooting through the portal! 
It will give us the same result as adding them up!
en.47d3601b: If we shoot a group of 2 birds by x2 portal we will come out with 4 birds! Because 2x2 is the same as 2+2 resulting in 4.
en.8c721b58: That was amazing, right? Multiplication can help you a whole lot!
en.b7c68159: Let’s learn a bit more about it?
en.808bc3df:
4x2 = 8 The X right here means “times”! So to read it you go: “Four times Two equals Twelve”

Think about the X as “groups of” so 4x2 would be 4 groups of 2!
en.da4eba97: But how would be 6x2 = 12 in addition, how many groups of 2 would you need?
en.faf979af: That’s right! 6x2 means “Six times Two” or “6 groups of 2 objects”
en.f06b6b13:
That’s not it! Let’s try again?
Think about the X as “groups of” so 6x2 would be 6 groups of 2!
en.2de89fcd: Hey RED! Sorry about the delay!
en.128ecf53: Let’s take those pigs outta here!
en.53f7318a: Now you have other options of groups to choose from!
en.56d74e72: But the logic is still the same. The number you choose will be multiplied by the portal you pass!
en.e5f936e3:
You did it! Easy right?
Let’s take a look at the multiplications you made just now:
en.9496af80: Hey you got the same result using different groups of birds? That’s amazing! Let’s understand how it works!
en.0d95e3a1:
The portals had a 6 on the top, meaning you had to hit it with 6 birds right?
There are 2 ways of getting the final result of six here!
en.bb27e323: Did you know that the places in multiplication have names?! Crazy right? And it’s super easy! Look!
en.683c7195: You are doing great! Let me tell you what I found out!
en.717aefb7:
The numbers before and after the x are called Factors!
And the ones after the = are called Product.
So in 2 x 3 = 6, 2 and 3 are Factors and 6 is the Product!
en.9cbdeb95: That was so good! Let’s see if you understand the names now?
en.5f10dd10: Which of them are the Factors?
en.274286cb: That’s not it! Factors are always before and after the x.
en.bb424166: Which of them is the Product?
en.300f6154: That’s not it! Let’s remember the product stays after the = ok?
en.268e6637: That’s right! The number on top of the rocks represents the result you must achieve to break it down, the product!
en.4ca58002:
That’s right! Both of these options are factors in multiplication because they stay beside the x!
 In the game they are the birds you select and the portal you pass by!
en.16161f76: Let's keep it up! The multiplication portals will help us now!
en.6578a922: You got the Factors, but what about the Product?
en.DynamicError1: Oh no, It doesn't seem quite right...
en.DynamicError2: Let's take a closer look at the multiplication you just did!
en.DynamicError3:
Try something like this instead! 
Don't worry you got this!
en.tryAgainMessage: Oops, you missed it. Try aiming at the barrier
